$ go run ./agents/s01-minimum-loop "say hi"
I ran the echo tool on "say hi". Task complete.

# What just happened (annotated):
#   turn 0: provider returns StopReason="tool_use" + ToolCalls=[{echo "say hi"}]
#           → loop dispatches EchoTool.Run, appends {Role:"tool", Content:"echo: say hi"}
#   turn 1: provider returns StopReason="end_turn" + Content="I ran the echo tool on \"say hi\"..."
#           → loop returns final text to main()
